name: Output 0 - Lock signal to Door
info:
Input 0 - Lock signal from BCM
Input 1 - Unlock signal from BCM

Voltmeter ~ 0.2V - Door Closed
Voltmeter ~ 2.9V - Door Open

Output 0 -> Lock signal to door actuator
Output 1 -> Unlock signal to door actuator

name: Output 1 - Unlock signal to Door
info:
Input 0 - Lock signal from BCM
Input 1 - Unlock signal from BCM

Voltmeter ~ 0.2V - Door Closed
Voltmeter ~ 2.9V - Door Open

Output 0 -> Lock signal to door actuator
Output 1 -> Unlock signal to door actuator
